title: Origins: Demigod Legacy
description: Be the Legacy of Gods, With Brand new Powers.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod. You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in 1.10.0 of origin, so for other versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

This Origins added mew layer to Select as class.

# Demigod Legacy 
Be the Legacy of Gods, With Brand new Powers.
![Zeus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1egEnLn2/images/2b806ee406668997d8aac5d73d030fa9ef0bf403.png)|![Poseidon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1egEnLn2/images/c6c5277a6d8f2307f1b0b15d93714333d7440690.png)|![Hades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1egEnLn2/images/efae0b65580630dc41cbb43d35573f45474173b9.png)|
-|-|-
![Amaterasu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b5c51fb9960b42ca92d264fb2d7e59e9e6a46fc.png)|![Susanoo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15fd131c3f1cfe09e18b9f83e35904eeadaed997.png)|![Tsukuyomi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eec004115af3272ff7bf63f79951edb5ecf6a71.png)
<details>
<summary>Greek</summary>
  
- **Zeus**
  - Legacy of the King of Olympus, Zeus. Your demigod body carries the essence of his powers, granting you access to parts of his domain. You are the illegitimate royal of Olympus.
  - **Powers**
    - **Lord Ascension**
      - You have been granted the ability to fly around the world just like your father himself. Gravity does not control you.
    - **Mark of Olympus**
      - Attacks will mark the target for 10 seconds; the marked target will have a yellow glowing effect on them. No enemy will escape your sight.
    - **Thuinder Carnival**
      - When a Zeus Legacy is at y90 or higher, all marked targets will be struck by lightning and their marks will be removed. This event would also create a thunderstorm.
    - **King's Heart**
      - Your maximum health will increase by 10%. Let the king's Legacy live long.
- **Poseidon**
  - Legagy of the Greek ocean God, Poseidon. You are one with the very sea itself. Blessed by the waters with many correlating abilities.
  - **Powers**
    - **Trident's Retainer**
      - Using the Crouch and Sprint key will turn any sword into a Trident with loyalty 3 and channeling 1. The Legacy of Poseidon should have a weapon fit for them.
    - **Sea Cycle**
      - When you attack with a trident in your main hand, the trident will cycle between Loyalty 3 with Channeling 1 to Riptide 3 every time you hit a target with the trident in your main hand.
    - **Aquatic Synergy**
      - You have water breathing, dolphin's grace, and conduit power.
    - **Ocrean Warrior**
      - Damage increased by 10%, and increased to 30% when in water or rain.
- **Hades**
  - Legacy of the Greek God of the Underworld. Hades. You are the heir to the throne of the Underworld. Do not disappoint your father. Gather souls to enter his kindgom.
  - **Powers**
    - **Blood Bath**
      - Any killing will increase your max health by 1 point and attack damage by 1%, a maximum of 20 stacks, and every 1 minute reduces 1 stack, killing will reset the timer. Let their shed blood clothe you with power.
    - **Wealth of the Reaper**
      - When you use a Netherite sword your attack speed increases by 10%.
    - **Styx's Helm**
      - Your attack damage is increased by 5% and your movement speed is increased 5%. Let the souls inside that river give your body strength.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Shinto</summary>
  
- **Amaterasu**
  - Legacy of the chief of the Shinto Gods and Goddess of the sun. You are the one who holds the sun. Even though your fighting may not be strong, you are a support who shines like the sun to guide and heal your allies.
  - **Powers**
    - **Heart of the Sun**
      - Your divine nature reduces your physical resilience and strength, but bathes you in a golden celestial glow..
    - **Mark of Shinto**
      - Sneak and interact with a target to mark them with a red glow, making them visible to all and eligible for your grace.
    - **Solar Flight**
      - The sun grants you the ability to soar through the skies and nourishes your body during clear days.
    - **Divine Resonance**
      - When you are whole or near your divine siblings, you resonate with a 50-block healing aura for all marked allies.
    - **Celestial Glow**
      - You emit various divine particles depending on your current state and active abilities.
- **Susanoo**
  - Legacy of the Shinto God of storms. You are a fierce warrior who dances with the winds. Your strikes are as fast as a lightning bolt, accumulating static charge to call down the wrath of the heavens.
  - **Powers**
    - **Volt Velocity**
      - Your body vibrates with tectonic energy. You attack with blinding speed, but each strike carries less physical weight.
    - **Rolling Thunder**
      - Like a storm front, you are slow to start but unstoppable once you gain momentum.
    - **Shockwave**
      - Your strikes transmit a paralyzing static charge to your targets.
    - **God's Shockwave**
      - Every 7th hit with a sword calls down a lightning bolt upon your target.
    - **Storm Soul**
      - Your very presence kicks up dust and emits a divine glow from the heavens.
- **Tsukuyomi**
  - Legacy of the Shinto God of the Moon. A complex support-illusionist who thrives in darkness, utilizing a shifting Lunar Phase to weave silver veils and bind shadows.
  - **Powers**
    - **Sovereignty of the Waxing Moon**
      - Your power is bound to the moon. You grow stronger and faster as your Lunar Phase resource increases during the night, but weaken during the day.
    - **Veil of the Silver Moon**
      - When cloaked in shadows and empowered by the moon, you become a flickering phantom. Allies and enemies alike glow in your silver sight.
    - **Mirror of the Darkened Sky**
      - Taking damage while veiled shatters the lunar mirror, blinding and slowing nearby enemies at the cost of your lunar power.
    - **Divine Alignment**
      - Your siblings anchor your celestial essence. Near Amaterasu or Susanoo, your lunar power is stabilized, and you grant them increased interaction range.
</details>

<details>
<summary>To-do Character List</summary>

- Thor
- Loki
- Odin
- Valkyries

- Sun Wu Kong
- Erlang Shen

- Guardians Four
  - White Tiger
  - Vermilion Bird
  - Azure Dragon
  - Black Tortoise

- Ra
- Osiris
</details>
